kendra.datasource.onedriveusers.OneDrive.Description: A list of users whose documents should be indexed. Specify the user names in email format, for example, `username@tenantdomain`. If you need to index the documents of more than 100 users, use the `OneDriveUserS3Path` field to specify the location of a file containing a list of users.
The S3 bucket location of a file containing a list of users whose documents should be indexed.
